languages.text:
С помощью своего мехадендрита техножрец может восстановить {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} союзника один раз за бой.
До конца боя увеличенный {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, который цель получает за каждый уровень {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, уменьшен на 5%.
Союзник получает <u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + число уровней {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g} на цели)</u> здоровья.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

traits.locale_text:
С помощью своего мехадендрита техножрец может восстановить {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} союзника один раз за бой.
Союзник получает <u>(6 + {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Медицина{/g} / 5)</u> здоровья.

С помощью своего мехадендрита техножрец может восстановить {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} союзника один раз за бой.
Союзник получает <u>(6 + {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Медицина{/g} / 5)</u> здоровья.

languages.text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the wounds of an ally once per combat.
Negative effect of target`s Ferrum Sanctum is reduced by 5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains (6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + target's Ferrum Sanctum level) wounds.

traits.locale_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the wounds of an ally once per combat.
Increased shock damage dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
The ally regains <u>(6 + {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} / 5)</u> wounds.

The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the wounds of an ally once per combat.
Increased shock damage dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by 5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains <u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

languages.text:
技术神甫每场战斗可使用一次机械触须为盟友恢复{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。
目标因{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}效果受到的额外{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}每层减少5%，持续至战斗结束。
该盟友恢复<u>（6+{uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf}+目标的{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}层数）</u>点生命值。
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

技术神甫每场战斗可使用一次机械触须为盟友恢复{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。
目标因{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}效果受到的额外{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}每层减少5%，持续至战斗结束。
该盟友恢复<u>（6+{uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf}+目标的{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}层数）</u>点生命值。

languages.text:
技術司祭は各戦闘につき1回、機械触手を使って一人の味方の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}を回復させることができる。
味方は<u>(6+{g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}メディケア{/g}/5)</u>の傷を回復する。
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
The ally regains <u>(6 + {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} / 5)</u> wounds.

traits.locale_text:
技術司祭は各戦闘につき1回、機械触手を使って一人の味方の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}を回復させることができる。
味方は<u>(6+{g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}メディケア{/g}/5)</u>の傷を回復する。

languages.text:
El tecnosacerdote puede usar su mecadendrita para restaurar las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de un aliado una vez por combate.
El {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional que sufre el objetivo por el efecto de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} se reduce en un −5 % por acumulación hasta el final del combate.
El aliado recupera +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + número de acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} del objetivo)</u> heridas.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

traits.locale_text:
El tecnosacerdote puede usar su mecadendrita para restaurar las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de un aliado una vez por combate.
El {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional que sufre el objetivo por el efecto de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} se reduce en un −5 % por acumulación hasta el final del combate.
El aliado recupera +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + número de acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} del objetivo)</u> heridas.

languages.text:
Der Techpriester kann mit seinem Mechadendrit einmal pro Kampf {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} eines Verbündeten regenerieren.
Erhöht den {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}, den das Ziel erleidet, da der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Effekt bis zum Ende des Kampfes um −5 % pro Stapel reduziert wird.
Der Verbündete regeneriert +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + Zahl der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Stapel des Ziels)</u> Wunden.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

traits.locale_text:
Der Techpriester kann mit seinem Mechadendrit einmal pro Kampf {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} eines Verbündeten regenerieren.
Erhöht den {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}, den das Ziel erleidet, da der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Effekt bis zum Ende des Kampfes um −5 % pro Stapel reduziert wird.
Der Verbündete regeneriert +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + Zahl der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Stapel des Ziels)</u> Wunden.

languages.text:
Le technoprêtre peut utiliser sa mécadendrite pour soigner les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} d'un allié une fois par combat.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} supplémentaires infligés à la cible avec l'effet {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} sont réduits de −5 % par cumul jusqu'à la fin du combat.
L'allié voit +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + nombre de cumuls de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} de la cible)</u> de ses blessures soignées.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

traits.locale_text:
Le technoprêtre peut utiliser sa mécadendrite pour soigner les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} d'un allié une fois par combat.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} supplémentaires infligés à la cible avec l'effet {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} sont réduits de −5 % par cumul jusqu'à la fin du combat.
L'allié voit +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + nombre de cumuls de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} de la cible)</u> de ses blessures soignées.

languages.text:
Tekno Rahip, çatışmada bir kez bir dost birimin {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını tazelemek için mekadentritini kullanabilir.
{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir kutak{/g} etkisinin her birikimde %5 azalmasından dolayı hedefe artırılmış {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verilir. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
Dost birim, +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + hedefin {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi sayısı)</u> kadar sağlık puanını geri kazanır.
languages.original_text:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.

The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.

{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir kutak{/g} etkisinin her birikimde %5 azalmasından dolayı hedefe artırılmış {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verilir. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
